message:
Fix bw-tree split materialization, align MVCC checkpoint loading with field-privacy API, and simplify WAL decode

- bw_tree.rs: Split deltas now correctly prune keys >= separator during page
  materialization instead of being handled identically to merge deltas. A new
  MaterializeOp::Split variant removes keys that belong to the split-off sibling
  page, fixing incorrect page contents after split operations.

- persist.rs: Checkpoint loading now uses advance_counters() and insert_versions()
  accessor methods instead of directly mutating MvccStore fields, aligning with
  the field-privacy refactor from commit 9132ceb.

- wal.rs: Remove the is_all_zero() early-return check from WAL commit decoding.
  Zero-filled regions should not be silently treated as end-of-data since they
  can appear in legitimate WAL data. Only truly empty buffers trigger EndOfData.
  The now-unused is_all_zero helper is deleted.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
